title: roystonea borinquena
intro: Roystonea borinquena, also known as the Puerto Rican palm or the Borinquen palm, is a species of palm tree native to Puerto Rico and the northeastern Caribbean. The medicinal properties of Roystonea borinquena include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support immune function, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Roystonea borinquena include infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
